description.overview: A sturdy Irish terrier bred for hunting badgers and foxes. Glens are gentle, patient dogs with a big heart despite their medium size.
description.history: The Glen of Imaal Terrier originated in Ireland.
description.temperament: Known for being gentle, spirited, brave.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their medium-length, harsh coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: A sturdy Irish terrier bred for hunting badgers and foxes. Glens are gentle, patient dogs with a big heart despite their medium size.
